s: In 2004, Francisco Cruceta suited up for CLE as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 9.390, WHIP 1.830, SO 9, WAR 0.100.
Changed teams after the previous season (CLE -> SEA).
In 2006, Francisco Cruceta suited up for SEA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 10.800, WHIP 2.400, SO 2, WAR -0.300. Notable context: Joined SEA.
Changed teams after the previous season (SEA -> DET).
In 2008, Francisco Cruceta suited up for DET as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.400, WHIP 1.970, SO 11, WAR -0.200. Notable context: Joined DET.
